steps.title: Identify the key requirement
steps.content: The prompt asks to “emphasize how long Hess's sport has been a Paralympic event.” The decisive signal is in the notes: “Swimming has been an event at the Paralympics since 1960” — this temporal information is what needs to be emphasized.

steps.title: Select the answer that includes swimming's historical timeline
steps.content:
Choice C directly states that swimming “has been an event at the Paralympic Games since 1960,” answering the prompt's requirement to emphasize the sport's long history.

The other three focus on Hess's personal achievements and career span or omit any information about the sport's timeline.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
